arabicText: هَذَا يَوْمُ الْفَرَحِ وَالسُّرُورِ وَالتَّقَرُبِ إِلَى اللَّهِ بِالْقُرْبَانِ
latinTransliteration: Hādhā yawmul-faraḥi was-surūri wat-taqarrubi ilallāhi bil-qurbān
englishTranslation: This is the day of joy, happiness, and drawing close to Allah through sacrifice.
wolofTranslationStandard: Bisu mbégte la nuy dund, ak jubeel ci sa Boroom ci jëf yu rafet.
wolofalAjamiScript: بِسُ مْبِجْتِ لَ نُيْ دُنْدْ اَكْ جُبِيلْ سِ سَ بُرُومْ سِ جِࣺفْ يُ رَفِتْ

arabicText: وَصِلُوا أَرْحَامَكُمْ وَتَصَدَّقُوا عَلَى الْفُقَرَاءِ وَالْمَسَاكِينِ
latinTransliteration: Wa ṣilū arḥāmakum wa taṣaddaqū ‘alal-fuqarā'i wal-masākīn
englishTranslation: And maintain your family ties and give charity to the poor and needy.
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgëral say dige ci say bokk, te joxe ci ñi soxla ak ñi néewi doole.
wolofalAjamiScript: دِٜجِٜrَلْ سَيْ دِجِ سِ سَيْ بُكِّ تِ جُخِ سِ نْيِ سُخْلَ اَكْ نْيِ نِيوِ دُولِ

arabicText: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ عِيدَنَا سَعِيدًا وَعَمَلَنَا صَالِحًا مَقْبُولًا عِنْدَكَ
englishTranslation: O Allah, make our Eid happy and our deeds righteous and accepted with You.
wolofTranslationStandard: Yàlla na nga def sunu fete jii mu nekk mbégte, te nangu sunuy jëf.
wolofalAjamiScript: يَٚlَّ نَ نْجَ دِفْ سُنُ فِتِ جِ مُ نِكَّ مْبِجْتِ تِ نَنْجُ سُنُيْ جِٜfْ

arabicText: وَأَعِدْهُ عَلَيْنَا بِالْخَيْرِ وَالْبَرَكَةِ وَالْيُمْنِ وَالْإِيمَانِ دائماً
latinTransliteration: Wa a‘idhu ‘alaynā bil-khayri wal-barakati wal-yumni wal-īmāni dā'imā
englishTranslation: And bring it back to us with goodness, blessing, prosperity, and faith always.
wolofTranslationStandard: Te delloo ko ci nun ci at yu bari and ak baax, barkeel ak ngëm.
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ دِلُّو كُ سِ نُنْ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ اَنْدْ اَكْ بَآخْ بَرْكِيلْ اَكْ نْجِٜnْ

arabicText: هَذَا يَوْمُ الْفَرَحِ وَالسُّرُورِ وَالتَّقَرُبِ إِلَى اللَّهِ بِالْقُرْبَانِ [5]
latinTransliteration: Hādhā yawmul-faraḥi was-surūri wat-taqarrubi ilallāhi bil-qurbān (5)
englishTranslation: This is the day of joy, happiness, and drawing close to Allah through sacrifice. (Stanza 5)
wolofTranslationStandard: Bisu mbégte la nuy dund, ak jubeel ci sa Boroom ci jëf yu rafet. (Wers 5)
wolofalAjamiScript: بِسُ مْبِجْتِ لَ نُيْ دُنْدْ اَكْ جُبِيلْ سِ سَ بُرُومْ سِ جِࣺفْ يُ رَفِتْ [5]

arabicText: وَصِلُوا أَرْحَامَكُمْ وَتَصَدَّقُوا عَلَى الْفُقَرَاءِ وَالْمَسَاكِينِ [6]
latinTransliteration: Wa ṣilū arḥāmakum wa taṣaddaqū ‘alal-fuqarā'i wal-masākīn (6)
englishTranslation: And maintain your family ties and give charity to the poor and needy. (Stanza 6)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgëral say dige ci say bokk, te joxe ci ñi soxla ak ñi néewi doole. (Wers 6)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِٜجِٜrَلْ سَيْ دِجِ سِ سَيْ بُكِّ تِ جُخِ سِ نْيِ سُخْلَ اَكْ نْيِ نِيوِ دُولِ [6]

arabicText: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ عِيدَنَا سَعِيدًا وَعَمَلَنَا صَالِحًا مَقْبُولًا عِنْدَكَ [7]
englishTranslation: O Allah, make our Eid happy and our deeds righteous and accepted with You. (Stanza 7)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yàlla na nga def sunu fete jii mu nekk mbégte, te nangu sunuy jëf. (Wers 7)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَٚlَّ نَ نْجَ دِفْ سُنُ فِتِ جِ مُ نِكَّ مْبِجْتِ تِ نَنْجُ سُنُيْ جِٜfْ [7]

arabicText: وَأَعِدْهُ عَلَيْنَا بِالْخَيْرِ وَالْبَرَكَةِ وَالْيُمْنِ وَالْإِيمَانِ دائماً [8]
latinTransliteration: Wa a‘idhu ‘alaynā bil-khayri wal-barakati wal-yumni wal-īmāni dā'imā (8)
englishTranslation: And bring it back to us with goodness, blessing, prosperity, and faith always. (Stanza 8)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te delloo ko ci nun ci at yu bari and ak baax, barkeel ak ngëm. (Wers 8)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ دِلُّو كُ سِ نُنْ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ اَنْدْ اَكْ بَآخْ بَرْكِيلْ اَكْ نْجِٜnْ [8]

arabicText: هَذَا يَوْمُ الْفَرَحِ وَالسُّرُورِ وَالتَّقَرُبِ إِلَى اللَّهِ بِالْقُرْبَانِ [9]
latinTransliteration: Hādhā yawmul-faraḥi was-surūri wat-taqarrubi ilallāhi bil-qurbān (9)
englishTranslation: This is the day of joy, happiness, and drawing close to Allah through sacrifice. (Stanza 9)
wolofTranslationStandard: Bisu mbégte la nuy dund, ak jubeel ci sa Boroom ci jëf yu rafet. (Wers 9)
wolofalAjamiScript: بِسُ مْبِجْتِ لَ نُيْ دُنْدْ اَكْ جُبِيلْ سِ سَ بُرُومْ سِ جِࣺفْ يُ رَفِتْ [9]

arabicText: وَصِلُوا أَرْحَامَكُمْ وَتَصَدَّقُوا عَلَى الْفُقَرَاءِ وَالْمَسَاكِينِ [10]
latinTransliteration: Wa ṣilū arḥāmakum wa taṣaddaqū ‘alal-fuqarā'i wal-masākīn (10)

wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgëral say dige ci say bokk, te joxe ci ñi soxla ak ñi néewi doole. (Wers 10)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِٜجِٜrَلْ سَيْ دِجِ سِ سَيْ بُكِّ تِ جُخِ سِ نْيِ سُخْلَ اَكْ نْيِ نِيوِ دُولِ [10]

wolofTranslationStandard: Yàlla na nga def sunu fete jii mu nekk mbégte, te nangu sunuy jëf. (Wers 11)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَٚlَّ نَ نْجَ دِفْ سُنُ فِتِ جِ مُ نِكَّ مْبِجْتِ تِ نَنْجُ سُنُيْ جِٜfْ [11]

arabicText: وَأَعِدْهُ عَلَيْنَا بِالْخَيْرِ وَالْبَرَكَةِ وَالْيُمْنِ وَالْإِيمَانِ دائماً [12]

wolofTranslationStandard: Te delloo ko ci nun ci at yu bari and ak baax, barkeel ak ngëm. (Wers 12)
